data.name: Ophi’s Quest Reign of Lust
data.detailed_description:
Ophi’s Quest Reign of Lust is a strategy boss rush game, where you are Ophelia, a bunnykin girl who found the possessed armor of an old overlord by accident.

Now Ophelia and the once banished overlord, Larhamal, must fuel the magic overlord tower with lust power, defeating Bosses, collecting items, and capturing girls to upgrade their units and facilities to try to conquer the floating island of Gouda.

Facilities

Use the powers of the overlord tower to summon dimensional spaces that will provide services like item crafting, unit training, and unlockables.

Each facility is managed by one of the overlords' commanders. You can interact and work with them to upgrade the Overlord Tower.

Battle powerful bosses

Prepare a loadout composed of units and magic spells to defeat powerful bosses. Capture them, their materials, and their subordinates to serve on the overlord tower.

Each battle takes various attempts to succeed, but each failure will give you experience to upgrade your units for the current battle!

Upgrades

After your battles, you are rewarded with materials. You can also use these materials in facilities to upgrade your units and facilities, including very sexy and explicit art for the biggest upgrades!

Units

A Collection of units with different stats and mechanics to fit all kinds of different gameplay styles. If you want to focus on healing and defense with the Wildlings or the unit death mechanics of The Risen, it's up to you! It's always fun to mix and match units to adapt to every boss encounter

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit)
  • 處理器: AMD: Radeon HD 7000 Series or higher
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
  • 儲存空間: 170 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit)
  • 處理器: AMD: Radeon HD 7000 Series or higher
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
  • 儲存空間: 170 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64Bit)
  • Processor: AMD: Radeon HD 7000 Series or higher
  • Graphics: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
  • Storage: 170 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64Bit)
  • Processor: AMD: Radeon HD 7000 Series or higher
  • Graphics: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
